mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO user_video_interactions (user_id, video_id, impression_count, last_impressed_at, updated_at) VALUES
(#{userId}, #{videoId}, 1, NOW(), NOW())
ON CONFLICT (user_id, video_id) DO UPDATE SET impression_count = user_video_interactions.impression_count + 1, last_impressed_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW()

INSERT INTO user_video_interactions (user_id, video_id, viewed_count, last_viewed_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{videoId}, 1, NOW(), NOW()) ON CONFLICT (user_id, video_id) DO UPDATE SET viewed_count = user_video_interactions.viewed_count + 1, last_viewed_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW()
